name: 系统发生
subject: biology
domain_name: Unit 7-8 进化与生态 Evolution & Ecology
curriculum_points: Explain how the properties of water that result from its polarity and hydrogen bonding affect its biological function.
Living systems depend on the properties of water to sustain life.

Water has polarity, because of the formation of polar covalent bonds between hydrogen and oxygen within water molecules. This polarity contributes to hydrogen bonding between and within biological molecules.
The hydrogen bonds between adjacent polar water molecules result in cohesion, adhesion, and surface tension.

excerpts.text: Explain how the properties of water that result from its polarity and hydrogen bonding affect its biological function.
Living systems depend on the properties of water to sustain life.

Water has polarity, because of the formation of polar covalent bonds between hydrogen and oxygen within water molecules. This polarity contributes to hydrogen bonding between and within biological molecules.
The hydrogen bonds between adjacent polar water molecules result in cohesion, adhesion, and surface tension.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「系统发生」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Explain how the properties of water that result from its polarity and hydrogen bonding affect its biological function.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Living systems depend on the properties of water to sustain life.… 对理解「系统发生」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
